season.heading: Savor the Season
season.tagline: eat well, feel good with our fresh seasonal menu
season.body: Built to feel light, vibrant, and seriously satisfying. Colour your cravings and keep things fresh this season with purple sweet potato mash, herb-crusted proteins, avocado, sweet corn, crunchy greens, edamame, nuts, seeds, and our house-made dressings like pesto, yuzu soy, salsa verde, and honey mustard.

wholefoodBowls.tagline: Whole foods made for real life.
wholefoodBowls.priceNote: Small RM15.50 · Regular RM19.50 · Large RM23.50
